name: Battlefield Commander WWII
short_description: Battlefield Commander WWII is a real-time tactical game where you lead the soldiers and vehicles that battled across the globe during this time in history. Play hundreds of unique units across multiple game modes.
detailed_description:
Battlefield Commander WWII is a real-time tactics game that emphasizes strategic decision-making over micromanagement, with a focus on realistic combat and authentic unit behavior.

Years and Theaters

The game contains units from the Soviet Union and Germany spanning the late war period (1944-45). Units from the early war ('39-'41) and mid-war ('42-'43) are planned to be introduced. Other nations, including the US, UK, and Japan, are planned for the future. The European, African, and Pacific theaters of war are all planned to be included.

Game Modes

The game currently has single-player skirmish and a dynamic campaign.

There are two different battle modes to choose from -

  • Battle - Gain victory points by destroying enemy units.

  • Flags - Gain victory by controlling the most strategic areas on the map.

Dynamic Campaign

The dynamic campaign takes place in Eastern Europe, playable as either Germany or the USSR. Each region has a production value that represents how many reinforcement points you get per turn if you control it. Deploy forces out of your capital, or in regions where you have built a factory. Gain victory by eliminating the enemy, capturing their capital, or reducing their morale to 0. Choose to simulate or play the battles. More campaigns will be added when other nations are added to the game!

Gameplay

Experience realistic combat with limited ammo, morale, energy, LOS, and shot accuracy. Infantry can be suppressed, panic, and rout if morale drops too far. Vehicles have accurate armor, movement, and penetration values.

Start each battle with requisition points, which you will use strategically throughout the fight to pull in new reinforcements and counter your enemy. Order your troops to charge head-first into the enemy or sneak and outflank your opponent for an ambush! Overwhelm the enemy with heavy infantry or overrun them with unstoppable armor. Use snipers and recon units to scout the enemy and discover their intentions. Control units like the quick and agile "Puma," the terror-inducing "Katyusha," the iconic T-34, and the monster Tiger II. Command the battlefield and lead your army to victory!

Features

  • Destructible buildings

  • Multiple weather options

  • Line-of-sight tool

  • Over 90 different units

  • Realistic vehicle armor and penetration

  • Realistic infantry behavior

  • Single player skirmish vs AI

  • Single player dynamic campaign
